meta.title: Terms & Conditions | Padel2Go
meta.description: General Terms and Conditions of PADEL2GO UG — terms of use for booking padel courts via padel2go.de.

scope.heading: § 1 Scope
scope.p1Prefix: These General Terms and Conditions (hereinafter "Terms") apply to all contracts concluded between PADEL2GO UG (haftungsbeschränkt), Am Neudeck 10, 81541 Munich, Germany (hereinafter "PADEL2GO" or "we") and users (hereinafter "User") via the platform
scope.p2: These Terms govern in particular the brokerage and booking of padel courts as well as the use of associated services (Rewards, Lobbies, community features).
scope.p3: Deviating terms and conditions of the User shall not be recognised unless PADEL2GO expressly agrees to their application in writing.

registration.heading: § 2 Registration & User Account
registration.p1: The use of services requiring booking is subject to free registration. The User is obliged to provide truthful and complete information upon registration and to keep this information up to date.
registration.p2: The user account is non-transferable. The User is responsible for all activities carried out under their account and must keep their access credentials confidential.
registration.p3: PADEL2GO reserves the right to temporarily suspend or permanently delete user accounts in the event of violations of these Terms or misuse.

items.label: Booking process:
items.text: By clicking "Pay now", the User submits a binding offer to conclude a usage contract for the selected court and time slot. The contract is concluded upon receipt of payment confirmation.

items.label: Prices:
items.text: All prices stated are final prices in euros including statutory VAT, unless otherwise indicated.

items.label: Payment:
items.text: Payment is processed via the payment service provider Stripe. Accepted payment methods include credit and debit cards as well as other methods offered by Stripe. The booking is only bindingly confirmed after successful payment.

items.label: Split Payment:
items.text: Users may split a booking across several co-players. The booking User remains responsible for the full receipt of payment. Unpaid shares will be charged to the booking User unless otherwise agreed in the respective booking details.

items.label: Voucher codes:
items.text: Voucher codes can be redeemed at checkout. A maximum of one voucher code may be used per booking. Vouchers are non-transferable, cannot be combined with other promotions and cannot be exchanged for cash.

cancellation.heading: § 4 Cancellation & Right of Withdrawal
cancellation.noWithdrawalText: Pursuant to § 312g (2) no. 9 BGB, there is no statutory right of withdrawal for contracts concerning leisure services where the entrepreneur undertakes to provide the service at a specific time. Court bookings fall under this exemption.
cancellation.userText: Cancellations are only possible via the user account. Depending on the time of cancellation, the following conditions apply:
userList: More than 24 hours before the booking starts: full refund
Less than 24 hours before the booking starts: no refund
cancellation.providerText: In the event of force majeure, technical issues or other unforeseeable events that make it impossible to carry out the booking, the full amount will be refunded.

userDuties.heading: § 5 User Obligations
list: to use the booked court punctually during the reserved time slot and to leave it in proper condition
to comply with the rules of use of the respective venue
not to make bookings for third parties without their express consent
not to misuse the platform (e.g. manipulation of rewards, use of stolen payment data)
not to send automated requests (bots, scraping) to the platform
userDuties.outro: In the event of violations of these obligations, PADEL2GO reserves the right to assert claims for damages and to block the user account.

rewards.heading: § 6 P2G Rewards & Credits
rewards.p1: PADEL2GO operates a voluntary reward system (P2G Rewards). Credits and points have no monetary value and cannot be paid out. They serve exclusively to be redeemed against available rewards in the PADEL2GO Marketplace.
rewards.p2: PADEL2GO reserves the right to modify, expand or discontinue the rewards system, point rules and available rewards at any time. There is no entitlement to the permanent retention of a specific credits balance.
rewards.p3: If a booking is cancelled, the credits granted for that booking will be reversed accordingly.

liability.heading: § 7 Liability & Warranty
liability.p1: PADEL2GO shall be liable without limitation for intent and gross negligence as well as for damages resulting from injury to life, body or health.
liability.p2: In cases of slight negligence, PADEL2GO shall only be liable for breaches of essential contractual obligations (cardinal obligations) and only to the extent of the foreseeable damage typical for the contract. Liability is otherwise excluded.
list: damage caused by the User themselves or by the respective court operator
technical failures of third-party services (in particular Stripe, Supabase)
loss or damage of User belongings at the venue

privacy.heading: § 8 Data Protection
privacy.prefix: The collection and processing of personal data takes place in accordance with our
privacy.suffix: , which forms an integral part of these Terms.

changes.heading: § 9 Amendments to the Terms
changes.p1: PADEL2GO reserves the right to amend these Terms with reasonable prior notice (at least 4 weeks). Users will be informed of material changes by email. Continued use of the platform after expiry of the notice period shall be deemed acceptance of the amended Terms.

final.heading: § 10 Final Provisions
final.p1: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG).
final.p2: For consumers, this choice of law applies only to the extent that it does not deprive them of mandatory consumer protection provisions of the state in which the consumer has their habitual residence.
final.p3: The place of jurisdiction for merchants and legal entities under public law is Munich.
final.p4: Should individual provisions of these Terms be or become invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall remain unaffected.
final.odrPrefix: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution:
final.odrSuffix: . We are neither obliged nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
